titles.en: Disobeying Allah in solitude invites divine judgment
Disobeying Allah in solitude invites divine judgment

segments: ٣٢٤. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): اتَّقُوا مَعَاصِيَ اللهِ فِي الْخَلَوَاتِ، فَإِنَّ الشَّاهِدَ هُوَ الْحَاكِمُ.
arabic.text: ٣٢٤. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): اتَّقُوا مَعَاصِيَ اللهِ فِي الْخَلَوَاتِ، فَإِنَّ الشَّاهِدَ هُوَ الْحَاكِمُ.

segments: 324. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Beware of disobeying Allāh in solitude, because the witness (of that situation) is also the judge.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 324. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Beware of disobeying Allāh in solitude, because the witness (of that situation) is also the judge.
